name: weekly-retrospective
description: Sunday night retrospective — review the week, update skills, improve the pipeline
prompt:
Sunday night retrospective. Review the week and improve the team:

1. Review completed tasks from this week — what went well, what had rework?
2. Check .claude/memory/incidents.md — any patterns emerging?
3. Review skills in .claude/skills/ — any that need updating based on this week's work?
4. Update agent definitions if any agent consistently struggled with something
5. Create 'Research:' tasks for Saul's Monday session based on this week's gaps

After updates, post a brief weekly summary to #forge-pipeline:
- Tasks completed this week
- Skills updated
- Top priority for next week

This is the self-improvement cycle. Make the team better every week.
